arts.sum: Lazio coach Marco Baroni insists his team wants to do well in the Coppa Italia, but exacting vengeance is not on their minds. arts.sum: Having only recently made his return to the squad following a long-term injury, Lazio defender Patric has reportedly suffered a setback. The Background The 31-year-old has been out with an ankle injury since the start of the year. Many feared his condition would require surgery, but after undergoing treatment in Barcelona, the tests suggested he […] The post Lazio Stalwart Suffers Injury Relapse – Marco Baroni Forced To Change Plans appeared first on The Laziali.

arts.ttl: Inter Slated to Create Their Second Team in Serie C
arts.sum: Inter are ready to establish their own U-23 squad, joining Juventus, Atalanta, and Milan, which took this route in recent years, as Giuseppe Marotta announced during a meeting of the board: "We're putting it together. It'll place in Monza." The post Inter Slated to Create Their Second Team in Serie C appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
